privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated 'SR-2026-X' sounding rocket mission setup script. An independent physics simulation of the provided initial orbital parameters (3.5 km/s velocity, 70 deg FPA) and drag model confirms the expected impact latitude is approximately 31.7 degrees, longitude -69.4 degrees (290.6 degrees East), and Time of Flight (TOF) is ~18 minutes. These physical calculations fully validate the scoring bounds (lat [25, 36], lon [-73, -60], tof [5, 25]) and all file paths specified in the task metadata.
